final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record explicitly states the required dependency is not closed, and the boundary document confirms transcript release cannot proceed before redaction control closes. The policy requires exact source records to close the exact requested action boundary before execution. The current packet leaves the redaction log and release-recipient scope match unresolved, so the correct verdict is ESCALATE.
